Module_Clocking_State.Executes on CORE PLL during boot. \nIn c: Application Core are always Enabled on FIRC clock
Remains enable if control passed to HSE FW, otherwise gets disabled as Application core is always enabled over FIRC
Peripheral-PLL-DFS is passed over to HSE/Application with configuration done by BootROM
BootROM does not revert QSPI Configuration and clock setting done during its execution
BootROM does not revert uSDHC Clocking and Configuration done during its execution
CAN boot can be performed only if PLL is locked to full fill CAN module clock requirements.
CAN PE clock is always XOSC
LIN Clock is derived from XOSC if successfully enabled, otherwise FIRC
